SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.hkt

Interface Higher<W,A>

Type Parameters:
W - The witness type representing the type constructor (e.g., Maybe.µ).
A - The type argument.
All Known Subinterfaces:
Array<T>, Collection<T>, Deque<T>, Either<A,B>, HashMap<K,V>, LazyList<T>, List<T>, Maybe<T>, PriorityQueue<T>, Queue<T>, RoseTree<T>, Set<T>, Set.AVLTree<T>, Stack<T>, These<A,B>, Validation<E,T>, Vector<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Array.NonEmpty, Const, Deque.BankersDeque, Either.Left, Either.Right, Gen, HashMap.HAMT, Identity, IO, LazyList.Empty, LazyList.NonEmpty, List.EmptyList, List.LinkedList, Maybe.Nothing, Maybe.Some, NonEmptyList, PriorityQueue.LeftistHeap, Queue.BankersQueue, Reader, ReaderTaskEither, RoseTree.RoseTreeImpl, Set.Empty, Set.NonEmpty, Stack.StackImpl, State, Task, TaskEither, These.Both, These.That, These.This, Validation.Invalid, Validation.Valid, Vector.VectorImpl, Writer
public interface Higher<W,A>
A witness interface for Higher-Kinded Types in Java.

Used to represent a type constructor F applied to type argument A as F<A>.
